chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4027 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of Petition. 18.09.2024. Mr. Fahad Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, seeking that direction be issued for his appointment in the Provincial Health Department on the basis of what he has terms to be a “Son Quota”. However, learned counsel for the Petitioner was unable to point out any rule or policy conferring a right of appointment on such a basis. Furthermore, as it transpires, it appears that an application for appointment was moved by the Petitioner in that regard as far back as 10.10.1996, with the Petition then having been filed as belatedly as 21.08.2024, bereft of any proper explanation for the delay and resultant laches. Under such circumstances, the matter does not present a fit case for issuance of a writ and the Petition stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
